prestazioni: Engine: 6A12 1997cc DOHC 24V V6 with HKS GT-SS Supercharger Kit (8.5psi boost, 300whp target) paired with HKS Hi-Power 40mm blow-off valve and HKS Racing Suction Reloaded intake system for optimized airflow under forced induction

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2.2-way) with custom 3.944 final drive ratio (from EVO IV) and reinforced driveshafts by Tomei Powered, mated to a Holinger RD6 sequential gearbox (6-speed) with paddle shifters for ultra-fast gear changes

Suspension: Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valving for FTO chassis) with Eibach ERS 1000N/mm helper springs, Cusco front strut bar (22mm hollow), and Cusco rear 4-point subframe brace for reduced flex under lateral G-forces
estetica: Aero: Veilside Fortune 03 widebody conversion kit (FRP construction) with custom 3-piece Work Meister S1 3P 17x9.5 +38 (front) and 17x10.5 +38 (rear) wheels, wrapped in Toyo R888R 235/40/17 and 265/35/17 tires for aggressive stance and grip

Exterior: C-West GPX-specific front bumper with integrated LED DRLs (Osram 6000K), custom carbon fiber hood (Seibon) with heat extractor vents, and rear diffuser by Varis (polyurethane, bolt-on) for improved downforce at high speeds

Interior: Bride Zeta III bucket seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved) with Schroth 6-point harnesses, MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede), and custom half-cage by AutoPower (4-point, bolt-in) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360)
